title: Software Update - DFU - Perform DFU with no internet [New]
scenario: DFU with no internet connection shows "Feature unavailable" dialog on Device Settings > Software Update screen
steps: 1. Turn off Wi-Fi on the mobile device.
3. Pair the headset with the app (if not already paired).
4. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings → Software Update.
7. Turn on Wi-Fi on the mobile device.
9. Observe the DFU screens that appear (expect 3-step DFU flow).
10. Turn off Wi-Fi on the mobile device.
11. Tap the Continue button on the DFU screen.
expected: Step 6: A "Feature unavailable" dialog is displayed. Step 9: The 3-step DFU (Device Firmware Update) screens are displayed. Step 12: A "Feature unavailable" dialog is displayed again.
